do_if.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and $target.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: $target.commander? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: $target.allsubordinates? and @$target.allsubordinates.count gt 0 and $target.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

$target.defaultorder? and @$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target.commander}? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: not $commander? or not $commander.exists or not $commander.allsubordinates? or @$commander.allsubordinates.count lt 1

show_notification.text: '[GT] Redistribute Pilots unavailable: no eligible subordinates found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] Requested for commander ' + $commander.idcode + ' with ' + @$commander.allsubordinates.count + ' subordinates'

do_elseif.value: $ship.commander? and $ship.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is in a blacklisted or dangerous sector and is actively trying to leave. No trades will be searched until the ship reaches a safe sector.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship trade destination was threatened or blacklisted. Ship is searching for an alternative route or cancelling the current trade.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has cargo from a previous session or order. It must sell all existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades. The ship is looking for the best buyer for its current cargo.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is damaged and heading to a shipyard or equipment dock for repairs. Trading is paused until repairs are complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is actively running the GalaxyTrader order. It is either searching for trades, executing a trade (buying/selling), or waiting for a work unit from the scheduler.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is currently executing a trade order (buying or selling at a station). This is a sub-order created by GalaxyTrader.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is resupplying (ammunition, deployables, etc.) at a station. Trading resumes after resupply is complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has an active repair order. It is heading to or being repaired at a shipyard/equipment dock.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is docked at a station or waiting. This may indicate it is waiting for docking clearance or between trade cycles.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is flying to a destination zone. It may be heading to a buy or sell station.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is executing a non-GT order (' + $activeOrderId + '). This order may have been queued externally or by another mod.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has no active order. It may be waiting for the default order to kick in, or the GT order may not be properly assigned.'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- MK2 Specific ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Stations', $Status = if $mk2SourceCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2SourceCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Destination Stations', $Status = if $mk2DestCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2DestCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Storage Thresholds (min/static/max)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $mk2MinStorage + '% / ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '% / ' + $mk2MaxStorage + '% (source must be ABOVE static; dest must be AT OR BELOW min)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve: ' + @$mk2SrcStation.knownname + ' / ' + $mk2sw, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'cargo target = 0 (station has no allocated storage for this ware - runtime skips silently)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve: ' + @$mk2SrcStation.knownname + ' / ' + $mk2sw, $Status = if $mk2swPasses then 'PASS' else 'BLOCK', $Detail = '' + $mk2swCount + ' / ' + $mk2swTarget + ' = ' + $mk2swRatio + '% ' + (if $mk2swPasses then '> ' else '<= ') + $mk2StaticStorage + '% staticStorage' + (if $mk2swPasses then ' (eligible to ship)' else ' (BELOW reserve - runtime refuses to drain)')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve Summary', $Status = if $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated == 0 then 'WARN' else (if $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic == $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated then 'BLOCK' else (if $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS')), $Detail = '' + ($mk2SourceWaresEvaluated - $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic) + ' / ' + $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated + ' source-ware combinations are above the static reserve' + (if $mk2SourceWaresMissingTarget gt 0 then ' (' + $mk2SourceWaresMissingTarget + ' have no storage allocated)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Miner Specific ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Anchor', $Status = if $minerHome == 'Not set' then 'FAIL' else 'PASS', $Detail = $minerHome]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Target Stations', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $minerTargetStations + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Overflow Sell', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $minerOverflow then 'Enabled' else 'Disabled']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Player Stations Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $minerPlayerOnly then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Overflow Threshold', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $minerOverflowThreshold + '%']

set_value.name: $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail
set_value.exact: 'none (no mineable cargo and no active mining ware snapshot)'

do_if.value: $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homeStation? and $gtOrder.$homeStation.exists and $gtOrder.$homeStation.isoperational and ((not $diagMinerPlayerStationsOnly) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.owner == $ship.owner)) and ((not $gtOrder.$homeSector?) or (not $gtOrder.$homeSector.exists) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.sector == $gtOrder.$homeSector)) and not $diagMinerPrimaryStations.indexof.{$gtOrder.$homeStation}

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Primary mode: only primary stations below ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% target fill'

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Overflow mode: fallback disabled, no additional sell targets allowed'

do_if.value: $mWare? and $mWare.hastag.minable and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.count gt 0 and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.max gt 0 and not $diagMinerOfferWares.indexof.{$mWare}

set_value.name: $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail
set_value.exact: 'auto-scope mode: all minable buyer offers (no selected/cargo ware available)'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Sell Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Miner Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $diagMinerPolicySummary]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Primary Stations', $Status = if $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count + ' stations']

do_if.value: $ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$Level?
not $rscRefIsHome and $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homePosition? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector
not $rscRefIsHome and $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homePosition? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists

not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.defaultorder? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector

not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.defaultorder? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists
not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.order? and $ship.order.$homePosition? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector
not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.order? and $ship.order.$homePosition? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists

$rscKeep and $ship.isplayerowned and $rscBlGroup? and $rscBlGroup != null and $ship.hasblacklist.{blacklisttype.sectoractivity}.{$rscBlGroup} and $rscSec.isblacklisted.{blacklisttype.sectoractivity}.{$rscBlGroup}.{$ship}
$rscW? and $rscW.hastag.minable and ($rscW.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'ware basket'

do_if.value: $rscW2? and $rscW2.hastag.minable and ($rscW2.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW2.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW2}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW2}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'current cargo'

do_if.value: $rscW3? and $rscW3.hastag.minable and ($rscW3.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW3.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW3}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW3}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'primary station buy offers'

set_value.name: $rscWareSource
set_value.exact: if $rscWareSourceList.count == 0 then 'none' else if $rscWareSourceList.count == 1 then $rscWareSourceList.{1} else if $rscWareSourceList.count == 2 then $rscWareSourceList.{1} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{2} else $rscWareSourceList.{1} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{2} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{3}

set_value.name: $rscWareSource
set_value.exact: 'sector resources in range (no basket, cargo, or station buy-offer pool)'

do_if.value: $rscW4? and $rscW4.hastag.minable and ($rscW4.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW4.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW4}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW4}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSectorsList
append_to_list.exact: table[$Name = $rscSecName, $Yield = $rscSecYield]

append_to_list.name: $rscWareRows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $WareName = if $rscWare.name? then $rscWare.name else '?', $IsActive = $rscIsActive, $HasAsteroids = $rscHasAsteroids, $DiscState = $rscDiscState, $Mineable = $rscMineable, $BestYield = $rscBestYield, $SectorCount = $rscWareSectorCount, $BestSector = $rscBestSecName, $TopSectors = $rscTopSectorsText, $EngineKnowsSectorName = $rscEngineKnowsSectorName, $ProbeInEngineKnownSector = $rscProbeInEngineKnownSector ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Scan Context ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reference Sector', $Status = if $rscRefSector? and $rscRefSector.exists then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = $rscRefSectorName]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Gather Range', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rscEffectiveRange + ' jumps' + (if $rscStayAtHome then ' (Stay At Home enabled, mining limited to home sector)' else if $rscMaxGather lt $rscMaxGatherRaw then (' (your setting: ' + $rscMaxGatherRaw + ', limited by pilot skill to ' + $rscPilotCap + ')') else (if $rscMaxGatherRaw gt 0 then '' else ' (your setting: 0)'))]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sectors In Range', $Status = if $rscRawSectors.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscRawSectors.count + ' sectors reachable from the reference sector']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Safe Sectors', $Status = if $rscKeptSectors.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscKeptSectors.count + ' usable / ' + $rscDroppedCount + ' excluded (hostile, hazardous, contested, or on your sector blacklist)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sector Blacklist Group', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $rscBlGroup? and $rscBlGroup != null then '' + $rscBlGroup else 'None']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Safe Sector Names', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $rscKeptNamesText]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Minimum Yield Rating', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rscMinYield + ' (sectors with a lower rating are ignored)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Candidate Wares', $Status = if $rscCandWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $rscCandWares.count + ' minable wares (taken from: ' + $rscWareSource + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reachable Wares', $Status = if $rscHasAsteroidsCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscHasAsteroidsCount + ' of ' + $rscCandWares.count + ' wares have asteroids in a safe sector in range (resource exists in sector, yield >= ' + $rscMinYield + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Discovery Coverage', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'no asteroids in range to evaluate discovery for' ]

set_value.name: $rscDiscDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $rscMineableCount + ' of ' + $rscHasAsteroidsCount + ' reachable wares are confirmed discovered and ACTUALLY mineable for this player ship'

set_value.name: $rscDiscDetail
set_value.exact: $rscDiscDetail + '; ' + $rscUndiscoveredCount + ' undiscovered for player-ship routing (engine refuses to route to an asteroid until it is asteroid-level discovered; resource probes reveal YIELD only - see the per-ware Wares table for the exact remediation per ware)'

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Discovery Coverage', $Status = if $rscUndiscoveredCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = $rscDiscDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Wares (best yield first, top 12) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No data', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No minable wares are available to this miner. Add a minable ware to the ship ware basket, give the ship a solid or liquid cargo bay, or assign a station that buys a minable ware (see Sell Wares above).']

set_value.name: $rscWNote
set_value.exact: if $rscOut.$Mineable then ('top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors) else (if $rscOut.$DiscState == 'undiscovered' then (if $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName? and $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName != '' then (if $rscOut.$ProbeInEngineKnownSector then ('engine knows the asteroid is in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ' and your resource probe IS already in that sector - the probe reveals YIELD only, vanilla mining still needs asteroid-level discovery for player ships; fly a ship close to the asteroid to scout it visually OR drop a satellite within line-of-sight (top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ')') else ('engine knows the asteroid is in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ' but no player resource probe is there - drop a probe in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ', scout the sector with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually (top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ')')) else ('asteroids exist in ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ' but the engine has not asteroid-discovered any - deploy a resource probe in one of these sectors, scout with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot it visually')) else ('no safe sector in range has yield >= ' + $rscMinYield))

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Status = $rscWStatus, $Check = $rscWLabel, $Detail = $rscWBest, $Col4 = $rscWReach, $Col5 = $rscWCount, $Col6 = $rscWNote ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '... (' + ($rscWareRows.count - $rscRenderCap) + ' more wares not shown)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Resource Probes (player faction, galaxy-wide) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'NPC ship', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'discovery is not gated for NPC ships - probe enumeration skipped']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Probes (galaxy-wide)', $Status = if $rscProbeTotal gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $rscProbeTotal + ' player-faction resource probe(s) found in the entire galaxy']

set_value.name: $rscProbeSecName
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeSec? and $rscProbeSec != null and $rscProbeSec.knownname? then @$rscProbeSec.knownname else 'unknown sector'

set_value.name: $rscProbeStatus
set_value.exact: if not $rscProbeObj.isoperational then 'WARN' else (if $rscProbeInKept then 'PASS' else 'WARN')

set_value.name: $rscProbeBucketNote
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeInKept then 'in this ship safe set' else (if $rscProbeInRaw then 'in range but FILTERED OUT of this ship safe set (hostile / hazard / contested / blacklist - useful to other fleet members only)' else 'OUT OF RANGE for this ship (>' + $rscEffectiveRange + ' gates from reference sector - useful to fleet members based closer)')

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe ' + $rscProbeIdc, $Status = $rscProbeStatus, $Detail = '[' + $rscProbeBucket + '] ' + $rscProbeSecName + ' (' + $rscProbeOpr + ') - ' + $rscProbeBucketNote ]

set_value.name: $rscProbeSY
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeSec? and $rscProbeSec != null and @$rscProbeSec.yieldrating.{$rscProbeWare} then @$rscProbeSec.yieldrating.{$rscProbeWare} else 0

set_value.name: $rscProbeWareStatus
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeRouteOK and $rscProbeInKept then 'PASS' else (if $rscProbeY gt 0 or $rscProbeSY gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO')

set_value.name: $rscProbeWareDetail
set_value.exact: 'probeYield=' + $rscProbeY + ', sectorYield=' + $rscProbeSY + ', routingDiscovered=' + (if $rscProbeRouteOK then ('yes -> ' + $rscProbeRouteSecName) else 'no (engine refuses to route a player ship - probe reveals YIELD only, asteroid-level discovery still needs visual / satellite scout)')

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = ' ' + $rscProbeWare.name, $Status = $rscProbeWareStatus, $Detail = $rscProbeWareDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe Buckets', $Status = if $rscProbeBucketKept gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = 'A-reachable for this ship: ' + $rscProbeBucketKept + ' | B-in-range-but-filtered: ' + $rscProbeBucketRaw + ' | C-out-of-range: ' + $rscProbeBucketOut ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe Diagnosis', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Other fleet members have probes deployed (B/C buckets) but NONE land in this ship safe-and-in-range set. This ship cannot benefit from those probes for ware selection. Either move this ship closer to a probe-covered sector, lift the safety filter that excluded the bucket-B sectors (raise gate distance / clear hostile-owner blacklist / accept hazardous regions), or have this ship deploy its own probe in a sector inside its safe set.' ]

append_to_list.name: $selWUndiscoveredAlts
append_to_list.exact: table[$Name = $selWWareName, $Urgency = $selWUrgency, $Sector = $selWRow.$BestSector, $EngineKnowsSector = $selWRow.$EngineKnowsSectorName, $ProbeInSector = $selWRow.$ProbeInEngineKnownSector]

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'no asteroid resource in any safe sector in range'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'undiscovered: asteroids exist in ' + $selWRow.$BestSector + ' but the player has not discovered them - deploy a resource probe in the sector, scout it with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot it visually'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'primary stations at ' + $selWStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold AND overflow sell to other stations is DISABLED - miner stuck waiting at galaxyminer.xml:1309'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'primary stations at ' + $selWStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold; overflow sell to other stations is enabled, so the miner will deliver to a non-primary buyer'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'SELECTABLE - primary fill ' + $selWStorageMax + '% lt ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% threshold' + (if @$selWRow.$IsActive then ' (currently the active mining target)' else '')

append_to_list.name: $selWAllScored
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Name = $selWWareName, $Urgency = $selWUrgency, $Status = $selWBlockerStatus, $Detail = $selWBlockerDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Selectability (what the miner would pick now) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = 'PASS', $Detail = $selWBest + ' (urgency ' + $selWBestUrgency + ', primary fill ' + $selWBestStorageMax + '% lt ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% threshold)' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = if $selWStalled then 'FAIL' else 'WARN', $Detail = $selWStallCandidate + ' (urgency ' + $selWStallUrgency + ') - but primary fill ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% is at or above the ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold' + (if $diagMinerAllowOverflowSellToOthers then '; overflow sell to other stations is enabled, so the miner can still deliver elsewhere' else '; overflow sell to other stations is DISABLED, so the miner is stuck waiting (see verdict)') ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'no mineable ware has any primary-station demand right now (no deficit at any primary station for any reachable+discovered ware)' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Demand Ranking (highest urgency first, with blocker reasons) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = '#' + $selWri + ' ' + $selWRankRow.$Name, $Status = $selWRankRow.$Status, $Detail = 'urgency ' + $selWRankRow.$Urgency + ' - ' + $selWRankRow.$Detail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = '... (' + ($selWAllScored.count - $selWRankCap) + ' more wares with positive urgency not shown)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Profit Threshold ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Profit Threshold', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + ($finalProfitThreshold / 100) + ' Cr']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Min ROI', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $effectiveROI + '%']

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Queue Status', $Status = $queueResult, $Detail = $queueDetail]

set_value.name: $procLockDetail
set_value.exact: 'Cache active: ' + $cacheActive + '/' + $cacheMax + ' | Live active: ' + $liveActive + '/' + $liveMax + ' | MK4 live active: ' + $mk4LiveActive + '/' + $mk4LiveMax

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Scheduler Slots', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $procLockDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Sector Refresh Lock', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $refreshLockDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Live Search Cooldown', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $cooldownDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Exists', $Status = if $cacheExists then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries']

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'N/A (no cache max-distance metadata yet) - ship needs: ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'Cache max distance metadata: ' + $cacheMaxDist + ' jumps; ship needs ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Max Distance', $Status = $cacheDistResult, $Detail = $cacheDistDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '#' + $ci, $Status = if $shipFailed == 'YES' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $detailStr]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Unique Wares In Cache', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $uniqueWares.keys.count + ' wares']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Expired Entries (>600s)', $Status = if $expiredCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $expiredCount + ' / ' + [20, $cacheEntryCount].min]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship In FailedShips', $Status = if $failedShipCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedShipCount + ' entries have this ship in FailedShips']

set_value.name: $sec8.$Name
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'Search Summary (Buyer Side)' else 'Search Summary'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Miner Offer Ware Scope', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sectorBreakdown
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $searchSec.knownname, $Status = $sectorOfferStatus, $Detail = $secMinerDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sectorBreakdown
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $searchSec.knownname, $Status = $sectorOfferStatus, $Detail = '' + $secSellCount, $Col4 = '' + $secBuyCount, $Col5 = '' + ($secSellCount + $secBuyCount), $Col6 = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Offers In Range (raw)', $Status = $diagMinerRawStatus, $Detail = '' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (engine + minable + cargo-fit; what the miner AI sees)']

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyStatus
set_value.exact: if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL')

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' of ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' pass primary/overflow policy'

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: $diagMinerPolicyDetail + ' - buyers exist but your config rejects them all'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Stations Buying Your Ore (policy-passing)', $Status = $diagMinerPolicyStatus, $Detail = $diagMinerPolicyDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Sell Offers', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $allSellOffers.count]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Buy Offers', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $allBuyOffers.count]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP: Player Suppliers Added', $Status = if $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded + ' player sell offer' + (if $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded == 1 then '' else 's') + ' admitted past relativeprice cap']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP: Player Buyers Excluded', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $diagIppPlayerBuyersRejected + ' player buy offer' + (if $diagIppPlayerBuyersRejected == 1 then '' else 's') + ' filtered (sell only to NPCs)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Per Sector ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

do_elseif.value: $ignoreCarrierAux and (($buyStation.isclass.ship and ($buyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $buyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($sellStation.isclass.ship and ($sellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $sellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)))

set_value.name: $bestDiagPairDesc
set_value.exact: $pairWare.name + ': ' + $buyStation.knownname + ' -> ' + $sellStation.knownname + ' (' + ($totalProfit / 100) + ' Cr, ROI ' + (if $diagPairPlayerFreeSupplier then 'n/a (free)' else ('' + $roi + '%')) + (if $diagPairPlayerFreeSupplier then ' [IPP gross]' else '') + ', Score ' + ($pairScore)i + ')'

append_to_list.name: $pairDetails
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pairWare.name, $Status = $pairVerdict, $Detail = $pdRoute, $Col4 = $pdProfitStr, $Col5 = $pdScoreStr, $Col6 = $pdReason, $SortKey = $pairScore]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below Profit Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowThreshold gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowThreshold]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below ROI Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowROI gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowROI]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Path Blocked', $Status = if $rejectPathBlocked gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectPathBlocked]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Blacklisted (station/sector)', $Status = if $rejectBlacklist gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBlacklist]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Build Storage Excluded', $Status = if $rejectBuildStorage gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBuildStorage]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Same Station (skipped)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectSameStation]

set_value.name: $sec8b.$Name

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sell Offers Passing Policy', $Status = if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' offers']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Search Sectors', $Status = if $searchSectors.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

set_value.name: $mAmount
set_value.exact: if $mOffer? and $mOffer.offeramount? and $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship}? then $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship} else (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.amount? then $mOffer.amount else 0)

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = if $mOffer? and $mOffer.ware? then $mOffer.ware.name else 'UNKNOWN', $Status = 'PASS', $Detail = $mStationText, $Col4 = '' + (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.unitprice? then ($mOffer.unitprice / 100) else 0) + 'Cr', $Col5 = '' + $mAmount + ' units', $Col6 = '']

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No sell opportunities found with current miner policy.'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No search sectors resolved (home sector/anchor unavailable for diagnose).'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No diagnose wares available (no mineable cargo and no active miner ware snapshot).'

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reason', $Status = 'FAIL', $Detail = $mNoOfferReason]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Hint', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'See Clearance section for per-sector/per-station rejection details.' ]

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'illegal/cargo: ship cannot carry ' + $pmWare + ' (cargo.max=0 - hold size or container type)'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'illegal/cargo: ' + $pmWare + ' is illegal here and Allow Illegal is OFF'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'noSrcOffer: source has no sell offer for ' + $pmWare + ' (typically: not a sellable ware here, station policy, or relation rules block ' + (if $ship.owner? then @$ship.owner.name else 'this faction') + ')'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'noSrcOffer: source offer present but ' + (if not $pmSrcOfferAvail then 'flagged unavailable' else 'amount=0 (station has no stock to sell right now)')

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'srcNoTarget: source has no allocated cargo target for ' + $pmWare + ' (cargo.target=0 - station manager has not assigned storage)'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'srcBelowStatic: source has ' + $pmSrcCount + '/' + $pmSrcTarget + ' = ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% <= ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '% staticStorage reserve (runtime refuses to drain a source below this floor)'

append_to_list.name: $mk2PairRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pmWare.name, $Status = $pmStatus, $Detail = $pmRoute, $Col4 = '' + (if $pmSrcRatio ge 0 then ('src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '%') else 'src n/a'), $Col5 = '', $Col6 = $pmReason]

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'self: source and destination are the same station'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'distance: no gate path from source to destination (gatedistance=-1, sectors not connected)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'distance: ' + $pmDist + ' gates > ' + $mk2OrderMaxDist + ' maxDistance (raise pilot level or maxDistance)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noDstOffer: destination does not buy ' + $pmWare + ' (not a resource, not a tradeware, or station/relation policy blocks)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noDstOffer: dest offer present but ' + (if not $pmDstOfferAvail then 'flagged unavailable' else 'demand=0 (cargo at or above target - no room)')

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noNeed: dst ' + $pmDstCount + '/' + $pmDstTarget + ' = ' + $pmDstRatio + '% is above ' + $mk2MinStorage + '% minStorage and src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% does not trigger the rebalance bucket (src must be >' + $mk2MaxStorage + '% maxStorage AND >dst+10)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'minTrade: computed trade amount is 0 (cargo room ' + $pmShipCargoMax + ', src offer ' + $pmSrcOfferAmount + ', dst demand ' + $pmDstOfferAmount + ')'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'eligible: bucket=' + $pmBucket + ' src=' + $pmSrcRatio + '% dst=' + $pmDstRatio + '% trade=' + $pmTradeAmount + ' units (final amount may be lower after fairness/reservation)'

append_to_list.name: $mk2PairRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pmWare.name, $Status = $pmStatus2, $Detail = $pmRoute2, $Col4 = 'src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% / dst ' + $pmDstRatio + '%', $Col5 = (if $pmDist ge 0 then ('' + $pmDist + ' gates') else ''), $Col6 = $pmReason2]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK2 Pairs Evaluated', $Status = if $mk2PairPass gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $mk2PairCount == 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL'), $Detail = '' + $mk2PairCount + ' src*dst*ware combinations checked, ' + $mk2PairPass + ' PASS, ' + ($mk2PairCount - $mk2PairPass) + ' BLOCK (showing first ' + $mk2PairRows.count + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No Pairs', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No source/destination stations configured (see MK2 Specific section)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Skip Breakdown', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'illegal/cargo=' + $mk2PairSkipIllegal + ', noSrcOffer=' + $mk2PairSkipNoSrc + ', srcNoTarget=' + $mk2PairSkipSrcNoTarget + ', srcBelowStatic=' + $mk2PairSkipBelowStatic + ', self=' + $mk2PairSkipSelf + ', distance=' + $mk2PairSkipDistance + ', noDstOffer=' + $mk2PairSkipNoDst + ', noNeed=' + $mk2PairSkipNoNeed + ', minTrade=' + $mk2PairSkipMinTrade]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount + ' scanned, ' + $pairDetails.count + ' shown (' + $passCount + ' PASS' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' and $diagShowExecutableOnly then ', executable-only view' else ', ' + ($pairCount - $passCount) + ' FAIL') + ')']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Mode', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Ship has cargo (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + ' used). In clearance mode, the ship must sell ALL existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades.']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- ' + $clWare.name + ' ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Carrying ' + $clWareAmount + ' units (volume: ' + $clWare.volume + '/unit)']

do_if.value: $clVerdict == 'PASS' and $ignoreCarrierAux and $clStation.isclass.ship and ($clStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $clStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)

set_value.name: $clReason
set_value.exact: 'ware is illegal to a faction (AllowIllegal: false)'

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name, $Status = $clVerdict, $Detail = $clStationFull, $Col4 = $clPriceDemand, $Col5 = $clRevenueStr, $Col6 = $clReasonStr]

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name + ' Summary', $Status = $clWareResult, $Detail = '' + $clPassCount + ' viable buyers out of ' + $clBuyerCount + ' total offers found']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation #' + $ri, $Status = if $resShip == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $resShipName + (if $resShip == $ship then ' (THIS SHIP)' else ''), $Col4 = $resWareName, $Col5 = 'TTL=' + $resTTL + 's', $Col6 = 'Key=' + $resKey ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Reservations', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $totalReservations + ' total, ' + $activeRes + ' active']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reservations', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'No reservation system initialized']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation Stats (Lifetime)', $Status = if ($rsCreated? and $rsCreated gt 0) then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = 'Created: ' + (if $rsCreated? then $rsCreated else 0) + ' | Cleared: ' + (if $rsCleared? then $rsCleared else 0) + ' | Expired: ' + (if $rsExpired? then $rsExpired else 0) + ' | Conflicts: ' + (if $rsConflicts? then $rsConflicts else 0) ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reservation Stats', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No stats available (system may not have initialized)']

append_to_list.name: $activeTradingShips
append_to_list.exact: table[$Ship = $atrShip, $Source = $tradeSource, $Ware = $tradeWareName]

set_value.name: $activeTradeSourceInfo
set_value.exact: 'fallback: current trade orders via global.$GT_Ships (' + global.$GT_Ships.keys.count + ' ships)'

do_if.value: $atrShip? and $atrShip.exists and $atrShip.isoperational and $atrShip.order? and (@$atrShip.order.id == 'TradePerform' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeBuy' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeSell')

append_to_list.name: $activeTradingShips
append_to_list.exact: table[$Ship = $atrShip, $Source = 'fallback current order: ' + @$atrShip.order.id, $Ware = 'Unknown (fallback)']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships With Active Trades', $Status = if $atrCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $atrCount]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Active Trade Source', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $activeTradeSourceInfo]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Active Trade #' + $ai, $Status = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $atrDetail, $Col4 = $atrWareName, $Col5 = $atrEntry.$Source, $Col6 = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'THIS SHIP' else '' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total GT Ships', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $totalGTShips]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships In Same Home Sector', $Status = if $sameHomeCount gt 5 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $sameHomeCount + ' (excl. this ship)']

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Failed Pair #' + $failedPairsCount, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $fspDetail]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Failed Pair #' + $failedPairsCount, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $fspDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Failed Sector Pairs', $Status = if $failedPairsCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedPairsCount + ' (for current sector)']

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE: Ship is in clearance mode but has no cargo. This should not happen.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'This may be a state inconsistency - try reassigning the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (ILLEGAL CARGO): All ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers blocked because ware is illegal to a faction and AllowIllegal is disabled. Ship cannot sell its cargo and is stuck in an infinite retry loop.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal on this ship/commander to allow selling the cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Or: manually sell the cargo, then reassign the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO VIABLE BUYER): ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers found but all rejected. Ship cannot sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check the Clearance tab for specific rejection reasons per station.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance or review blacklist settings.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO BUYERS): No buy offers found for current cargo in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors within range.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance to expand search radius.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check if any stations in range buy these wares.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE OK: ' + $clTotalPass + ' viable buyers found out of ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' total. Ship should be able to sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If the ship is not selling, check scheduler state and queue.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no source and no destination stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one source station and one destination station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no source stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one source station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no destination stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one destination station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK2 IDLE (source below static reserve): every sellable ware on the configured source station(s) is at or below the static-storage reserve of ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '%. The runtime refuses to drain a source until it climbs ABOVE this threshold. Worst case: ' + $mk2WorstSourceDetail + ' . Highest fill seen: ' + $mk2BestSourceDetail + ' .'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Wait for the source station to produce more stock (the static reserve is intentional - it prevents the trader from emptying a production line below operating margins).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'OR lower this trader''s Static Storage % in its order params (current ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '%) so it ships earlier - e.g. set it to a value below the highest source fill (' + $mk2BestSourceRatio + '%).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK2 IDLE (source has no storage allocated): the configured source station(s) have no cargo storage allocated for any of their sellable wares. The runtime cannot read a fill ratio and skips the pair silently.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Wait for the station manager to assign storage to the produced wares, or pick a different source station.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: No home sector - ship cannot search for trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Assign ship to a commander or set a home sector'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'BLOCKED: Money gate - player funds too low (' + ($playerMoney / 100) + ' Cr lt ' + ($moneyGateThreshold / 100) + ' Cr threshold)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase player funds or lower MinPlayerMoney setting'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'BLOCKED: Global money cap active - fleet budget exhausted'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Earn more money to lift the money cap'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'POLICY BLOCKING: ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer(s) found in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors but ALL rejected by your miner config (primary stations / overflow / playerStationsOnly). Miner can find buyers; your settings forbid selling to them.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Open the Miner Sell Offer Details / Clearance section to see which station/ware combinations were rejected and why.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Common fixes: add the actual sell-target station to Primary Target Stations; enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations; disable Player Stations Only.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If your primary station is full, the diag rejects offers above the overflow threshold - lower the threshold or add a backup station.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO OFFERS: ' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'No buy offers' else (if $allSellOffers.count == 0 then 'No sell offers' else 'No buy offers')) + ' found in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance to expand search radius'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check if sectors have operational stations'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER STALLED (overflow wait): ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' is the highest-urgency reachable ware (urgency ' + $selWStallUrgency + '), but every primary station is at or above the overflow threshold for it (worst fill ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%) and Overflow → Sell To Other Stations is DISABLED. The miner is looping in the demand-recheck wait at order.trade.galaxyminer.xml:1309 and will not deliver until something below changes.'

set_value.name: $selWVerdictAltText
set_value.exact: $selWVerdictAltText + $selWVerdictAlt.$Name + ' in ' + $selWVerdictAltSector + (if $selWVerdictAlt.$ProbeInSector? and $selWVerdictAlt.$ProbeInSector then ' (probe already deployed - asteroid still needs visual/satellite scout)' else '')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Scout these higher-priority alternatives (asteroids exist but are undiscovered, so vanilla mining refuses to route player ships there): ' + $selWVerdictAltText + (if $selWUndiscoveredAlts.count gt $selWVerdictAltCap then ' (+' + ($selWUndiscoveredAlts.count - $selWVerdictAltCap) + ' more)' else '') + '. ' + (if $selWAnyProbed then 'For sectors marked (probe already deployed) the resource probe reveals yield only - the engine still needs asteroid-level discovery for player-ship routing; fly a ship close to an asteroid OR drop a satellite within line-of-sight. For the others: deploy a resource probe in the sector, scout with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually.' else 'Deploy a resource probe in each sector, fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually, or have a satellite see it.')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations on this miner so it can deliver ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' to a non-primary buyer instead of waiting.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower the Overflow Threshold below ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% (current threshold: ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%) so the primary stations stop counting as full.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Add another primary station that buys ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' so this miner has a sink with real capacity.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER BUYERS AVAILABLE: ' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' of ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer(s) pass policy in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors' + (if $diagMinerAnyBuyerMode then ' (auto-scope: all minable wares)' else ' (policy-scoped)')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Miner Sell Offer Details for station/ware list and demand amounts.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'NOTE: ' + ($diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount - $allBuyOffers.count) + ' additional buyer offer(s) were rejected by your primary/overflow/playerStationsOnly policy - review the Clearance section if your miner is selling to stations not listed here.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If execution still stalls, compare against live order state (collecting/transfer/sell) and scheduler queue.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO MATCHING PAIRS: Offers exist on both sides, but no tradable sell-buy pairs could be formed'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Most matches were same-station loops (' + $rejectSameStation + ' skipped) - this is intentionally ignored.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check ware overlap between sell and buy offers in Pair Details.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance or review blacklist constraints to expose more counterpart stations.'

set_value.name: $maxRejectName
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' then 'mk4_price_cap_exceeded (source price gt customer buy price)' else 'no_profit (sell price le buy price)'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'ALL REJECTED: 0/' + $pairCount + ' pairs passed. Dominant reason: ' + $maxRejectName + ' (' + $maxReject + ' pairs)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower profit threshold base (current effective: ' + ($finalProfitThreshold / 100) + ' Cr)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower minimum ROI setting (current effective: ' + $effectiveROI + '%)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check dock size compatibility - ship is ' + $dockSize + '-class'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Some stations are not operational. Wait for production/storage recovery or pick other sectors.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal if you want to include illegal wares.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship cargo type cannot carry some wares. Limit ware basket or use suitable ship class.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower minimum cargo utilization target (current: ' + $effectiveCargoTarget + '%) or increase trade volume options (distance/wares).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Offer amount/cargo free/money limits reduce tradable amount to zero for many pairs.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review blacklist settings - some routes may be blocked'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'MK4 diagnose is in executable-only mode. Foreign-station routes are blocked by design and omitted from the Pair Details list.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review MK4 supplier policy (buyFromPlayer / buyFromFaction). Current policy excludes many suppliers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'serveHomeOnly is active: delivery must match home anchor (home station or home sector).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Demand is already covered by incoming reservations (vanilla + GT in-flight). Wait for execution/expiry or target different wares/stations.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship should be able to find trades. If it is not trading, check scheduler state and queue.'

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'VERDICT', $Status = $verdictStatus, $Detail = $verdict]

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'exec-only pairs, priceCap source<=customer, demandGate vanillaRes+gtInFlight(global), ignoreTradeRules=faction-access-only']

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Suggestion #' + $si, $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $suggestions.{$si}]

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or not $ship.commander? or not $ship.commander.exists

show_notification.text: '[GT] Promote unavailable: no valid commander found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Promote] Requested for subordinate ' + $ship.idcode + ' under commander ' + $ship.commander.idcode
